title: Section 3
content: (1) The powers of the said body corporate may only be exercised so long and so often as there are 1[six] members thereof. (2) The quorum necessary for the transaction of business at a meeting of the Trustees shall not be less than 2[four].
footnote: 1. Subs. by s. 3, ibid., for "nine". 2. Subs. by s. 3, ibid., for "six".
